title: Definitive timeline
wikitext:
[]: Definitive timeline             Quote Post by Jay911 » Sun Dec 31, 2006 6:19 am Apologies if this is posted somewhere - I've scoured the boards and the web and found nothing. Is there a source, even if just fan-made and reasonable enough that a number of fans agree upon it (i.e. perhaps this site's participants), where a definitive timeline for the events in the series and movies is provided? I've seen the timelines available on the web that provide detailed dates for everything up to Second Impact and/or the Children's birthdays, and then everything else is lumped in one large segment, i.e. "2015: Shinji Ikari arrives at NERV, third through fifteenth Angels attack, Shinji quits NERV, rejoins NERV, Rei dies, Rei lives again, Toji gets turned to paste, etc." Is there anything that provides a little more detail to the placement of the events of the series?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Dec 31, 2006 6:36 am Besides the one time (was there another?) we see a calendar in the series (after Misato and Shinji decide on who does the chores on what day), we get no definitive dates and we don't know how much time has passed between the events that you listed. The idea has occured to me once, esp since they give us the years of some major details in "The Birth of Nerv", but the events in the series itself has no temporal landmarks.

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Sun Dec 31, 2006 6:42 am Gotcha. I've been trying to get back into a fanfic writing state of mind, and I'd prefer to have a structure to work with. I rewatched the first few episodes this evening and found that they state 3 weeks elapse between the 3rd and 4th Angels.. I was kinda hoping someone had taken the time to note stuff like that down. :) Thanks anyway!

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sun Dec 31, 2006 8:11 am There's an Evangelion timeline on Wikipedia. Looking at it one would assume an episode or two taking place each month. However, there are two alternate timelines apparently. Episode 26 takes place in 2015, whereas Bardiel and onwards takes place in 2016.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Dec 31, 2006 8:34 am Knowing the elapsed time between 2 events doesn't really help unless you know the date of one of the events. But a quick run through: - 3 weeks between the 3rd and 4th angel showing up - 2 weeks between Shinji starting school and Shinji getting punched by Toji - 2 weeks between Shinji starting school and the 4th angel showing up - which means 1 week after 3rd angel battle Shinji starts school - 1 week between Asuka starting school and the 7th Angel appearing - 5 days after the 4th angel Shinji runs away - 2 days later he is brought back - 22 days after the failed Eva-00 activation test, the 4th Angel appears - 6 days between the 7th Angel showing up and it getting defeated - 3 days after the 7th Angel shows up, Toji, Hikari, and Kensuke visit the Katsuragi residence, they watch Shinji and Asuka do the twister thing - 5 days after the 7th Angel shows up, Asuka does the Walls of Jericho fanservice shot - Toji slept for 3 days after being crushed in the entry plug of Eva-03 - 7 days between Asuka running away (after finding out Kaji is dead) and being found by Section 2 - 7 days between Asuka running away and Kaworu showing up - 7 months for Rei to sync with Eva-00 - 1 month between the terrorist attack in Tokyo-2 and the 14th Angel appearing - 30 days after the 14th Angel appearing, Shinji is recovered from Eva-01 I probably missed a bunch of stuff and a few of these may be a bit inaccurate because you don't know how much time really elapsed between scene cuts. And I was wrong about the chores thing, that was only a chores chart by day of week. The calendar I meant was in ep09: indicating that the 11th falls on a Friday. In, 2015, the only months with the 11th on a Friday is September and December (the earlier release had "August" written on it, but it was removed for the video release). This means that our only point of reference for all those events that I listed is, the 7th Angel is defeated on either September 11th or December 11th. I'd have to say it was September as 3I happens the next year and Decemeber seems too close for the rest of the series' events to take place. I also didn't bother listing all the years given in ep21' because they don't give us exact dates and those events don't really happen in the timeline of the series itself. Szmitten wrote: There's an Evangelion timeline on Wikipedia. Looking at it one would assume an episode or two taking place each month. However, there are two alternate timelines apparently. Episode 26 takes place in 2015, whereas Bardiel and onwards takes place in 2016.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Dec 31, 2006 9:00 am it's also probably like two days between Episode 24 and EoE, but it's never made clear.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Dec 31, 2006 10:41 am I'm of the opinion that the Events in EoE occur on either January the 1st or 2nd of 2016. I also think Kaworu dies on the 31st of december 2015. That's really just rampant speculation though.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 31, 2006 10:58 am The turn of the year '15-'16 doesn't seem significant to me; I've taken on trust the vague notion that we start midway through '15, some time after Shinji's birthday, and, with the lack of seasons, that events carry over into early '16. NGE isn't the sort of show to concern itself with celebrating birthdays or solstices (whenever in the year that they fall after 2I); and there are easily 6+ months worth of time covered or alluded to. If I was going to try and put any calendrical spin on the events, I would expect 3I to be end of tax year time (same caveat about calling it the spring equinox as for solstices).

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 31, 2006 1:43 pm Apparently, EoTV/EoE happens around or on Januray 1st 2016, which makes sense to me. *shrugs* @ Mr.Tines: Hurray for lesbians!

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Sun Dec 31, 2006 1:48 pm Translated timeline, straight from the Death and Rebirth Special Edition theatrical pamphlet. http://evaotaku.com/html/dr2-timeline.html

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 31, 2006 3:23 pm Mr. Tines wrote: I've taken on trust the vague notion that we start midway through '15, some time after Shinji's birthday, and, with the lack of seasons, that events carry over into early '16. NGE isn't the sort of show to concern itself with celebrating birthdays or solstices (whenever in the year that they fall after 2I)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Dec 31, 2006 7:05 pm flatulant wrote: Translated timeline, straight from the Death and Rebirth Special Edition theatrical pamphlet. http://evaotaku.com/html/dr2-timeline.html

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Sun Dec 31, 2006 11:03 pm I appreciate the help everyone is providing here. I'm thinking I might try to develop something with the information we're gathering. I do have one question: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I'm of the opinion that the Events in EoE occur on either January the 1st or 2nd of 2016. I also think Kaworu dies on the 31st of december 2015. That's really just rampant speculation though.

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Sun Dec 31, 2006 11:39 pm ...Second Impact doesn't happen until September 13, 2000, not December 31, 1999? :x

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 31, 2006 11:44 pm I love your sig, Omegagouki. I'm actually one of the few people who liked the Shadow the Hedgehog game and beat all the endings.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 01, 2007 12:30 am Omegagouki wrote: ...Second Impact doesn't happen until September 13, 2000, not December 31, 1999? :x

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Mon Jan 01, 2007 12:32 am NAveryW wrote: I love your sig, Omegagouki. I'm actually one of the few people who liked the Shadow the Hedgehog game and beat all the endings.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Jan 01, 2007 12:56 am Jay911 wrote: I do have one question: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I'm of the opinion that the Events in EoE occur on either January the 1st or 2nd of 2016. I also think Kaworu dies on the 31st of december 2015. That's really just rampant speculation though.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 01, 2007 1:19 am When the harpies deploy their AATF, it's still 2015, according to Maya's laptop. ("The data is nearly identical!", etc.)

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Jan 01, 2007 1:22 am Ok then Kaworu died on the 29th. 3I happened sometime after midnight in Japan so it was 2016 when it all ended. Does that sound good?
